creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 235557
exult + exult-devel diff sugestion

I like an opinion about creating a master port (released version) and a slave one (devel snapshots).

games/exult only follows devel snapshots forgetting that exist between them, stable releases, as shown in downloads page:

(- Exult v1.6 - official release)
(- Exult v1.7.x Snapshots of current code)
- Exult v1.8 - official release
- Exult v1.9.x Snapshots of current code

What about creating a master port for v1.8 and a slave for devel?
